mnemonics.title: TRIE Structure
mnemonics.content: TRIE = Tree Retrieval Information Efficiently - Remember it stores text retrieval data efficiently

mnemonics.title: Suffix Order
mnemonics.content: Suffix Tries Store Substrings Sequentially - SSSS helps recall suffix storage

acronyms.expansion: Practical Algorithm To Retrieve Information Coded In Alphanumeric
acronyms.usage: Used for compressed binary radix trees

visualTips.visualization: Imagine tree branches merging where only single path exists - like zipping identical paths
Picture dashed arrows connecting nodes to jump between suffix positions

analogies.analogy: Like floors in a parking garage - each level represents a character position
Similar to a book index listing every possible substring starting point
